attempts.root_cause: 12 swing-segment features are highly redundant with the existing 101-factor baseline (Family R chart-patterns + Family D trend-quality + momentum factors already encode trend/pattern structure); incremental signal on a saturated factor zoo is faint. K=6 closest to significant (p=0.078) so structure signal exists faintly + short-horizon.
attempts.notes: paired incremental-IC, K in {6,8,12}, rank:ndcg XGBoost, 17-year LOTYO. Not abandoned — family T stays in the factor registry under the long-horizon funnel.
84 fixed length-9 MiniROCKET kernels + dilation + PPV pooling, numpy self-impl. Bridge layer between hand features and deep CNN. Downstream incremental-IC experiment evidence-gated.

TS2Vec-style dilated causal-conv encoder + hierarchical contrastive loss; GASF/GADF + patch views. window_len=63, embedding_dim=64. Pretrain corpus manifest = data/manifests/chart_structure_pretrain_corpus_v1.json. Full pretrain + downstream experiment evidence-gated.
